---
name: Demo / adapter / docs improvement
about: Suggest a focused improvement to demos, adapters, examples, or public docs
title: "[improvement] "
labels: ["improvement"]
assignees: []
---

## What are you trying to improve?

Describe the improvement in one or two sentences.

## Which area does it touch?

Pick one or more:

- demo flow
- adapter shape
- example payload
- docs / onboarding
- README / diagram / walkthrough

## What is the current problem or limitation?

What feels unclear, missing, or awkward right now?

## What change are you proposing?

Keep it concrete and as small-scope as possible.

## Why does this fit the public sidecar repo?

Explain why this improves the public Agent Preflight layer without turning the repo into the full private BAOS product.

## Optional extra context

Links, screenshots, example commands, or related files.
